titleEn: Float Control connects tyre pressure control system to Trelleborg sensor
titleZh: Float Control将轮胎压力控制系统与特瑞堡传感器连接
summaryZh: Float Control与特瑞堡轮胎合作，将轮胎压力控制系统与特瑞堡的ATMS传感器连接。传感器实时监测气压、温度和轴载，并通过App提供建议，系统可自动调整轮胎压力，支持道路、硬土和软土三种模式。传感器集成在轮胎胎面中，预期寿命5000小时，享受同等保修。该系统目前处于测试阶段，尚未公布价格和交付日期。
featuredReason: 该技术将轮胎压力控制与传感器数据联动，实现自动化调节，可显著提升农机作业效率和轮胎寿命，对智慧农业中的田间作业具有直接应用价值。
contentFull: Float Control connects tyre pressure control system to Trelleborg sensor 16-07 | Smart farming | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintAll information from the sensor in the tyre can be read via an app from Trelleborg Tires. Float Control’s tyre pressure control system is connected to this. Based on the sensor’s recommendations, the tyre pressure can be adjusted. Photo: Lars VerhageFloat Control, manufacturer of tyre pressure control systems, is presenting something unique in the tyre sector. In collaboration with Trelleborg Tires, Float Control is connecting its tyre pressure control system to the tyre manufacturer’s ATMS sensor. As a result, all tyre information is monitored using sensors.Float Control in Klaaswaal, South Holland, is delivering something completely new in the tyre sector together with tyre manufacturer Trelleborg Tires. Float Control has linked its tyre pressure control system to Trelleborg’s ATMS sensor. This sensor measures air pressure, temperature and axle load, among other things, after which it provides a recommendation for a specific tyre pressure.Completely newThe fact that a tyre contains a sensor that provides information is nothing new. What is new is that a tyre pressure control system is being linked to it. This means that everything relating to tyre pressure is controlled automatically in real time. This is all done via a sensor and app from Trelleborg Tires.The sensor in the tyre provides information. Based on this, a recommendation follows. That recommendation connects to the Float Control system, which automatically adjusts everything at the touch of a button. The system has 3 modes: a road mode, a ‘hard soil’ mode and a ‘soft soil’ mode. Depending on which mode is set, the sensor sends signals to the app. This can be every 5 seconds, but also every minute.5,000-hour warrantyThe sensor in the tyre is not rechargeable and is difficult to replace. This is because the sensor is incorporated into the tread of the Trelleborg tyre. The expectation is that the sensor will last 5,000 hours, as will the tyre. For this reason, Trelleborg Tires gives a 5,000-hour warranty on its new range of tyres.The intention, therefore, is that the sensor lasts as long as the tyre. The system is still in the test phase. No price or exact delivery date has yet been announced.Join 17,000+ subscribersSubscribe to our newsletter to stay updated about all the need-to-know content in the agricultural sector, two times a week. translationZh:
Float Control是轮胎压力控制系统的制造商，正在轮胎领域展示一项独特的产品。与特瑞堡轮胎合作，Float Control将其轮胎压力控制系统与轮胎制造商的ATMS传感器连接。因此，所有轮胎信息都通过传感器进行监控。

位于南荷兰省Klaaswaal的Float Control与轮胎制造商特瑞堡轮胎共同推出了一项在轮胎领域全新的产品。Float Control已将其轮胎压力控制系统与特瑞堡的ATMS传感器连接。该传感器测量气压、温度和轴载等数据，随后提供特定轮胎压力的建议。

**全新**

轮胎内置传感器提供信息并非新鲜事。新鲜的是，轮胎压力控制系统与之连接。这意味着与轮胎压力相关的一切都通过实时自动控制完成。这一切都通过特瑞堡轮胎的传感器和App实现。

轮胎中的传感器提供信息。基于此，系统给出建议。该建议连接到Float Control系统，只需按一下按钮即可自动调整一切。系统有三种模式：道路模式、“硬土”模式和“软土”模式。根据设定的模式，传感器向App发送信号。这可以是每5秒一次，也可以是每分钟一次。

**5000小时保修**

轮胎中的传感器不可充电且难以更换。这是因为传感器被集成到特瑞堡轮胎的胎面中。预计传感器和轮胎的寿命均为5000小时。因此，特瑞堡轮胎对其新系列轮胎提供5000小时保修。

因此，目标是传感器与轮胎寿命相同。该系统仍处于测试阶段。尚未公布价格或确切交付日期。
author: Lars Verhage
contentHtml: Float Control, manufacturer of tyre pressure control systems, is presenting something unique in the tyre sector. In collaboration with Trelleborg Tires, Float Control is connecting its tyre pressure control system to the tyre manufacturer’s ATMS sensor. As a result, all tyre information is monitored using sensors.
